testcase.name: test_01_create_fresh_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:65: in test_01_create_fresh_submission assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create submission: {"message":"Design submission created successfully","submission":{"submission_id":"DS-94353b9c7d6b","project_id":"proj_b5e9610f","milestone_key":"design_meeting_2","milestone_name":"Design Meeting 2 (3D Concept Freeze)","version":1,"previous_submission_id":null,"status":"pending_review","is_locked":true,"files":[{"filename":"test_design.pdf","url":"https://example.com/test.pdf"}],"checklist":[{"key":"floor_plan_finalized","label":"Floor Plan Finalized","checked":true},{"key":"3d_renders_ready","label":"3D Renders Ready","checked":true},{"key":"material_palette_selected","label":"Material Palette Selected","checked":true},{"key":"budget_aligned","label":"Budget Aligned","checked":true},{"key":"scope_coverage_complete","label":"All Areas Covered","checked":true},{"key":"client_requirements_addressed","label":"Requirements Addressed","checked":true}],"design_notes":"Full flow test submission - 2026-02-09T15:45:12.101994","concept_summary":null,"constraints_notes":null,"submitted_by":"test-user-1768140463239","submitted_by_name":"Thaha Pakayil","submitted_at":"2026-02-09T15:45:12.141293+00:00","deadline":null,"is_overdue":false,"days_until_deadline":null,"reviewed_by":null,"reviewed_by_name":null,"reviewed_at":null,"review_notes":null,"improvement_areas":[],"created_at":"2026-02-09T15:45:12.141293+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-09T15:45:12.141293+00:00"}} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue

failure.message: AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:100: in test_02_verify_submission_in_review_queue assert found, f"Submission {TestFullDesignApprovalFlow.test_submission_id} not found in review queue" E AssertionError: Submission None not found in review queue E assert False

testcase.name: test_03_approve_submission
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:115: in test_03_approve_submission assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to approve submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to approve submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_04_verify_approved_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_approval_flow.py:131: in test_04_verify_approved_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get submission: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get submission: {"detail":"Submission not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
